% On Consulting the Faithful in Matters of Doctrine, John Henry Newman,
% from the Rambler of July 1859, text from the NewmanReader
% transcription (newman-consulting.html, raw scrape preserved). One
% article, no chapters, its two notes inlined as footnotes. The text
% lives in consulting-body.tex, generated by consulting2tex.py; this
% file owns the preamble and title.
